title: clavarioidia clavarioides
intro:
Clavarioidia clavarioides, also known as the Clavaria clavulina, is a type of fungus and not a plant. However, I will still provide the information as per your request.

Clavarioidia clavarioides, a type of fungus, has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Clavarioidia clavarioides include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Clavarioidia clavarioides can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, although its use should be strictly under the guidance of a healthcare professional. More research is needed to fully understand the effects and benefits of Clavarioidia clavarioides.
